arts.ttl: Birmingham striker Alfie May makes statement ahead of Charlton Athletic League One return
arts.sum: Birmingham City striker Alfie May wants to score against his old side Charlton Athletic on Saturday but will not be celebrating if he finds the back of the net. The 31-year-old has five goals in eight League One appearances for Chris Davies’ side.

arts.ttl: Birmingham City star Alfie May warns Charlton 'story will come out'
arts.sum: “I think I said it last time, eventually the story will come out. Alfie May has promised the true story surrounding his Charlton Athletic exit will eventually come out after being subjected to abuse since swapping The Valley for St Andrew’s.

arts.ttl: Preview: Charlton Athletic vs. Birmingham City - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's League One clash between Charlton Athletic and Birmingham City, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Charlton Athletic boss on Greg Docherty and Thierry Small dropping out of starting line up
arts.sum: “We ask certain things from a midfield player or a wing-back that our essential to how we play,” said Jones, asked about the pair by the South London Press . Club captain Docherty has not started the last two League One matches while left wing-back Small has not made the squad since being subbed off in the 37th minute of the 2-1 defeat to Blackpool on September 21.
